message:
feat: add XDG Base Directory and CASS_MEMORY_HOME support

Centralizes all path resolution through resolveGlobalDir() instead of
hardcoded ~/.cass-memory/ references scattered across 14 files.

Path resolution priority:
1. CASS_MEMORY_HOME env var (explicit override)
2. XDG_DATA_HOME/cass-memory (when XDG_DATA_HOME is set)
3. ~/.cass-memory (default, backward compatible)

All functional expandPath("~/.cass-memory/...") calls replaced with
path.join(resolveGlobalDir(), ...). Config post-processing resolves
legacy Zod schema defaults to the dynamic global dir at load time.

Tests updated to verify security restrictions use semantic assertions
rather than checking raw unexpanded path strings.

Closes #36

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
